LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ASTRAGATE INC. MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD: NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (PETITION GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED). (302/JJM/AA) COURT REPORTER ERIC THRONE, CSR#7855

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER ASTRAGATE, INC.
